releaseNotes:
• FIXED: Dashboard profit now shows exact business profit (finalAmount - supplierCost)
• FIXED: Revenue uses actual payment from handed over entries, not estimated quotes
• FIXED: UpdateManager - download progress bar, install prompt after download, skip version until restart
• NEW: Search icon on Dashboard
• NEW: Invest card with Paid/Due breakdown dialog
• NEW: Customer Pay Later option in Handover
• REDESIGN: Direct Sales with mandatory supplier and quick add
